name: Volcanic Vigor
description:
This tattoo takes the shape of a muscular orc, with molten flesh and hollow eye sockets that seep smoke. You don't take damage from extreme heat or severe heat.

Activate 2 command

Frequency once per day

Effect You stomp on the ground, causing a 5-foot radius, 30- foot tall cylinder of lava to erupt from the ground within a range of 30 feet. The cylinder deals |options:area-damage] damage. All creatures in the area must attempt a save.
